tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Basically it goes from  Em   to  Am   


[Intro] 

Oh man, oh man, oh man, not again

[Verse]
  
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, I learned the game from William Wesley[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
You can never check me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Back to back for the niggas that didn't get the message[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Back to back like I'm on the cover of Lethal Weapon[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Back to back like I'm Jordan '96, '97[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Whoa, very important and very pretentious[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
When I look back I might be mad that I gave this attention[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Yeah, but it's weighin' heavy on my conscience[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, and fuck, you left The Boy no options[/tab]
I wanna see my niggas go insane
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
You gon' make me step out of my fuckin' frame[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
You gon' make me buy bottles for Charlamagne[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
You gon' make me go out of my fuckin' way[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I waited four days, nigga, where y'all at?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
I drove here in the Wraith playin' AR-AB[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I'm not sure what it was that really made y'all mad[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
But I guess this is what I gotta do to make y'all rap[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I mean woah, can't fool the city, man, they know what's up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Second floor at Tootsies, gettin' shoulder rubs[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
This for y'all to think that I don't write enough[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
They just mad cause I got the midas touch[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
You love her, then you gotta give the world to her[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Is that a world tour or your girl's tour?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I know that you gotta be a thug for her[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
This ain't what she meant when she told you to open up more[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Yeah, trigger fingers turn to twitter fingers[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, you gettin' bodied by a singin' nigga[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I'm not the type of nigga that'll type to niggas[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
And shout-out to all my boss bitches wife-in niggas[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Make sure you hit him with the prenup[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Then tell that man to ease up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I did another one, I did another one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
You still ain't did shit about the other one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I got the drink in me goin' back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, goin' back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I got the drink in me goin' back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, I'm goin' back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I don't wanna hear about this ever again[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Not even when she tell 'em that they better as friends[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Not even when you sayin', "Drizzy, tell 'em again"[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
I been puttin' on a show, it was a sell out event[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Oh, you need better seatin'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
I didn't wanna do it, gave me every reason[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
The point I'm tryna make is I don't ever need 'em[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Seen what you'd do for fame or what you'd do for freedom[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Please, check 'em for a wire or a earpiece[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Please, please do not let these niggas near me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Please, think before you come for the great one[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Please, who's a real nigga and who ain't one?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
Please, somebody stop me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
I'm talkin' boasy and gwanin wassy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
I got the fest in five days and it's my shit[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Soon as a nigga hit the stage, they gon'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
They gon' ask if I can play this shit back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]  
Yeah, they want it back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]  
They gon' ask if I can play this shit back to back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]                                                 [ch]Am[/ch]  
I took a break from Views, now it's back to that, nigga[/tab]
